recommendations.title: Disclose CHP & AHP Project in FY26 BRSR Filing
recommendations.description: Include detailed disclosure of the ₹590 Cr CHP & AHP project in the FY26 BRSR and Core BRSR filings by 2026-05-30 to avoid SEBI scrutiny and potential 20-40bps cost of capital increase.
recommendations.profitability_link: Avoid ₹10-20 Cr annual financing cost increase from 20-40bps cost of capital rise
recommendations.peer_benchmark: Tata Power's timely BRSR disclosures supporting green financing

recommendations.title: Align Project with EU Taxonomy for Green Financing
recommendations.description: Conduct a technical assessment by 2026-09-30 to align the CHP & AHP project with EU Taxonomy criteria to unlock green financing opportunities and reduce cost of capital by up to 30bps.
recommendations.profitability_link: Enable ₹15-25 Cr green bond opportunity at 30bps discount
recommendations.peer_benchmark: Tata Power's ₹5000 Cr green bond issuance at favorable rates

recommendations.title: Monitor Energy Price Shock and Escalate if >25% YoY
recommendations.description: Establish monthly monitoring of energy price changes; escalate to CFO and Risk Committee if price shock exceeds 25% YoY within 6 months to adjust hedging and input diversification strategies.
recommendations.profitability_link: Mitigate potential ₹50-100 Cr margin erosion from unhedged energy price shocks
recommendations.peer_benchmark: Competitors actively hedging energy price volatility to protect margins

immediate_high.title: Disclose CHP & AHP Project in FY26 BRSR Filing

immediate_low.title: Align Project with EU Taxonomy for Green Financing
Monitor Energy Price Shock and Escalate if >25% YoY
